rationale: Israeli strikes on Beirut continue and Trump's comments put the Iran deal at risk — modest indirect energy/geopolitical relevance for Poland, but no qualitative escalation beyond known background. Score adjusted down: ongoing situation without qualitative change.

top_events.title: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut; Trump says attacks unjustified, puts Iran deal at risk
top_events.summary: Continued Israeli strikes on Beirut and Trump's public criticism raise uncertainty around a US-Iran deal, which could affect global energy prices indirectly relevant to Polish consumers.

top_events.title: Israel expands military control in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria by 1,000 sq km
top_events.summary: Israel's territorial expansion in multiple theaters adds to regional instability but has no direct impact on Poland's security or economy beyond background energy price noise.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan investment agreement signals continued Western economic cooperation; minimal direct impact on Poland but mildly positive for broader allied economic stability.
